title: Qur'ān, hadith, and classical maqāṣid sources
subtitle: The source library used in Step 4 of any deliberation. Every source is presented in Arabic, transliteration, and bilingual translation, with translator named.

seedNotice.title: The library is currently a seed set.
seedNotice.body: The Arabic, transliteration, and translations are a good-faith first pass; we welcome scholarly review via pull request. The review workflow lives in /docs/scholar-review.md (Phase 6).
